title: Breaking Bad
description: A high school chemistry teacher diagnosed with inoperable lung cancer turns to manufacturing and selling methamphetamine to secure his family's financial future.
synopsis: Walter White, a struggling and frustrated high school chemistry teacher, is diagnosed with inoperable, advanced lung cancer. To secure his family's financial future before he dies, he teams up with his former student Jesse Pinkman to manufacture and sell crystal methamphetamine, using his deep knowledge of chemistry to produce the purest product on the market. Across five seasons he transforms from mild-mannered Mr. White into the ruthless drug kingpin Heisenberg.
cast: Bryan Cranston, Aaron Paul, Anna Gunn, Dean Norris, Betsy Brandt, RJ Mitte, Bob Odenkirk, Giancarlo Esposito
